output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's the Exact Letter to Get It Back
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for only $19.99.
content_outline: The Real Reasons Landlords Withhold Security Deposits (And What's Illegal)
Tenant Rights: Timeline and Deduction Rules by State
How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Actually Works
Escalating Your Claim: From Letter to Small Claims Court
Get Your Money Back in 60 Seconds—No Lawyer Required
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14–30 days with an itemized deduction list.
Landlords cannot legally deduct for normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, or pre-existing damage.
A formal demand letter is the fastest, most effective way to recover funds before escalating to court.
Deposits-Back.com lets tenants generate a state-compliant demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee—no signup or subscription.
output.cta: Stop waiting and start demanding. Generate your official security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, delaying, or deducting from their security deposit and need immediate, affordable legal leverage.

short_form_scripts.hook: Your landlord has 21 days to return your deposit. If they don't, you could sue for double or triple damages.
short_form_scripts.body: But before you sue, you need to send a demand letter. Not a text. Not an email. A formal legal letter that cites state law. Deposits-Back.com builds it for you in 60 seconds.
short_form_scripts.cta: Just $19.99, no signup, no subscription. Link in bio to get your deposit back now.

short_form_scripts.hook: 'Normal wear and tear.' Your landlord CANNOT deduct this. Period.
short_form_scripts.body: Scuffed floors? Small nail holes? Faded paint? That's normal wear. If your landlord is charging hundreds for 'cleaning,' they're scamming you. Fight back with a dispute letter.
short_form_scripts.cta: Generate yours in under a minute at Deposits-Back.com. $19.99 flat. Link in bio.
